extraction.one_line_summary: FROOME defended his 40-second GC lead over DUMOULIN on final mountain stage after DUMOULIN attacked repeatedly but cracked inside final 9km.
tactical_patterns: DUMOULIN attacked three times within 9km finale, each exceeding 600 watts, but serial efforts caused self-destruction before summit.
FROOME counterattacked after repelling DUMOULIN's digs, exploiting rival's overcommitment rather than purely defending tempo.
Team Sky marshalled breakaway gap all day while Sunweb lacked domestique support, forcing DUMOULIN into premature solo aggression.
NIEVE attacked from breakaway with emotion-driven aggression, suggesting psychological factors trump pure form on final mountain stages.

rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: negative: shook head after third acceleration inside 9km, went irreversibly into red from repeated maximal efforts.
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: positive: confident enough to counterattack after absorbing 600+ watt surges, read rival's overcommitment perfectly.
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: negative: hit severe bonk second consecutive day, nearly passed out requiring roadside sugar intervention.
rider_signals.YATES Simon: negative: dropped second consecutive day early in stage, revealing cumulative fatigue after previous efforts.
rider_signals.NIEVE Mikel: positive: attacked breakaway with anger-driven intensity, demonstrating psychological motivation compensates depleted legs late-race.
rider_signals.GROßSCHARTNER Felix: positive: escaped breakaway and held off chase to win, showing autonomy when given leadership freedom.
rider_signals.OOMEN Sam: negative: dropped immediately on first DUMOULIN acceleration, failed support role when leader needed pacing.
rider_signals.BILBAO Pello: negative: shed on initial surge inside 9km, insufficient climbing form for GC defense situations.
